positive: A minimalist, abstract celestial map featuring glowing geometric constellations interconnected by flowing, ethereal ribbons. The primary colors are deep indigo, cosmic violet, and shimmering gold, contrasting against a matte midnight background. The central composition features a stylized lunar eclipse and a prominent spiral nebula, rendered in a clean, graphic linework style reminiscent of esoteric scientific diagrams. The style should be modern graphic design, with high contrast and sharp edges for clear print transfer on apparel. Clean silhouette focus, central composition, volumetric lighting from the glowing elements, highly detailed, vector illustration quality.
negative: blur, text, watermark, low resolution, artifacts, grainy, noise, jpeg artifacts, signature, out of frame, bad anatomy, extra limbs, messy, disfigured, ugly
